detectors.description:

	State variables written after the call(s):

	VotingContract.nullifiers (src/VotingContract.sol#56) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- VotingContract.isNullifierUsed(uint256,uint256) (src/VotingContract.sol#574-581)
	- VotingContract.nullifiers (src/VotingContract.sol#56)
